overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark, futuristic cyberpunk building interior featuring neon-lit corridors and a green-lit service room. The footage appears to be from a video game with high-quality rendering, showcasing atmospheric lighting and sci-fi architectural elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk interior that gradually descends into a dim, oppressive corridor. It begins in a narrow hallway defined by glowing yellow pillars and digital screens, moving forward before turning right at an intersection past illuminated signage. As the camera progresses, the lighting shifts to dramatic red vertical strips and green neon accents along the dark walls. The scene then opens into a service room bathed in green fluorescent light, where the camera approaches a digital keypad labeled 02 GUEST ROOMS beside metal shelving and trash containers. Finally, the view exits the green glow and recedes into a series of dark, narrow passages where only faint distant lights and occasional screens provide minimal illumination.
